subject: [RFC PATCH 23/40] mm: page_alloc: targeted evacuation and dynamic reserves for tainted SPBs

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch reduces the proliferation of tainted superpageblocks by introducing dynamic reserves and targeted evacuation strategies. The reserve size is scaled based on the superpageblock size, allowing for more efficient use of memory. Before dropping ALLOC_NOFRAGMENT, the patch attempts to evacuate movable pages from tainted superpageblocks to prevent tainting clean ones. This approach aims to reduce memory fragmentation and improve performance.
